title: pectiantia breweri
side_effects: Pectiantia breweri can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives and itching, and gastrointestinal issues like nausea and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
